title: Lycanthropes
description: Werewolf mod based on a alternative source for their origin and powers.
body:
A mod about werewolves.

Adds werewolves and hunters to the game. You can hunt the werewolves for their fur wich can be used to make wool and leather, or join them and get acess to their strengths, and weaknesses. This is a simple mod mostly focused on cosmetic Items with the intent to encourage the players customizability and story telling.


Main Features

-7 Werewolf variants and the ability to transform into one using the werewolf armor(You can choose different colors for each armor piece)

-Silver materials, tools, armor and blocks

-16 Humans(you can trade with them and most transform when provoked at night)

-6 New structures(Small to medium size, all whith with loot)

-New Paintings that give hints about the mod

-2 New flowers

Made with MCreator
